creator: vanderh@ecf.utoronto.ca
text:
On Mon, Jan 25, 1999 at 08:58:51PM -0500, Mikhail Teterin wrote:
> 
> 	I was unable to fully figure out the purpose of pkg/INSTALL.tclsh.

Installs the script /usr/local/bin/tclsh which warns users typing
``tclsh'' that they shouldn't do that.  This supposedly cuts down on
false bug reports.  It's used by tcl[75|80|81] etc. from the common
tcl80 dir.


-- 
This .sig is not innovative, witty, or profund.
